content.query:
SELECT 		DISTINCT OC.CUNM AS CUSTOMER_NAME
,           OH.CUOR AS CUSTOMER_PO_NUMBER
,			ODH.ORNO AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER
,			ODL.IVNO AS INVOICE_NUMBER
,			IVDT AS INVOICE_DATE
,			IM.ITNO AS ITEM
,			IM.ITDS AS ITEM_NAME
,			ODL.IVQT AS INVOICED_QTY
,			ODL.NEPR*ODL.IVQT AS INVOICED_AMT
FROM		M3_ODHEAD ODH
JOIN		M3_ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN        M3_OOLINE OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
JOIN        M3_OOHEAD OH ON OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN 		M3_OCUSMA OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3_OOADRE OA on ODH.ORNO = OA.ORNO
JOIN 		M3_MITMAS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE       odl.ivno <> '0'
AND         OC.CUNO IN
(
'COM00055',
'COM00138',
'COM00259',
'COM00486',
'COM00884',
'COM00618',
'COM00628',
'COM01013',
'COM00252',
'COM00585',
'COM00623'
)
